findings.description: src/assistant/core/resilience.py: the ContextVar reset relies on _emit_attempt_span not raising. If _emit_attempt_span itself raised mid-block, the reset would be skipped and the var would carry the in-loop attempt index across the boundary. _emit_attempt_span is observability-only and shouldn't raise (it has its own swallow), but a try/finally around the per-attempt body would be marginally more defensive.
findings.resolution: Optional hardening: wrap the per-attempt body in try/finally so reset always runs even if span emission throws. Current implementation matches the surrounding pattern and is acceptable; defer to follow-up if at all.
